llmResponse.agenda_changes: Yes. The agenda was reordered at the start of the meeting. John (Dr. Baker) requested that the Oath of Office be moved up and taken before the Reception, and that the Recognition of María Díaz-Slocum be done after the Oath of Office but before the Board Officer's Rotation. The board agreed to these changes.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: can I please get a motion to approve the consent items? So moved. I'll second roll call, please.
